output.code:
# Let's load the text from the provided file path.
path = '/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:2000]

path = '/mnt/data/file-UGVGLXZkByUNMRAyoSi9Nq-Q130.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text)

first_quote = text.find('\"')
last_quote = text.rfind('\"')
first_quote, last_quote, text[first_quote:first_quote+2]

# Split quoted content by asterisk separators.
segments = []
start_positions = []
end_positions = []

pos = first_quote + 1  # start index in original text
i = pos
while True:
    star_index = text.find('*', i)
    if star_index == -1:
        # add remaining as one segment
        seg = text[i:]
        if seg:
            segments.append(seg.strip())
            start_positions.append(i + (0 if seg.startswith(text[i]) else text[i:].find(seg.strip())))
            end_positions.append(start_positions[-1] + len(segments[-1]))
        break
    # segment from i to star_index
    seg = text[i:star_index]
    segments.append(seg.strip())
    start_positions.append(i + (0 if seg.startswith(text[i]) else text[i:].find(seg.strip())))
    end_positions.append(start_positions[-1] + len(segments[-1]))
    # skip star and following space if present
    i = star_index + 1
    # skip spaces after star
    while i < len(text) and text[i] == ' ':
        i += 1

len(segments), segments[:5]

queries: وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَى لِفَتَاهُ لَا أَبْرَحُ حَتَّى أَبْلُغَ مَجْمَعَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ أَوْ أَمْضِيَ حُقُبًا سورة الكهف 60
فَلَمَّا بَلَغَا مَجْمَعَ بَيْنِهِمَا نَسِيَا حُوتَهُمَا فَاتَّخَذَ سَبِيلَهُ فِي الْبَحْرِ سَرَبًا 61
قَالَ لَهُمْ مُوسَى فَهَلْ إِذْ أَوْعَدْتُكُمْ مَوْعِدًا مِنَ الْقَادِرِينَ
قَالُوا لَنْ نَبْرَحَ عَلَيْهِ حَتَّى يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْنَا مُوسَى
قَالُوا لَنْ نَبْرَحَ عَلَيْهِ حَتَّى يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْنَا مُوسَى
قَالُوا لَنْ نَبْرَحَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفِينَ حَتَّى يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْنَا مُوسَى 20:91 سورة طه
فَأَنْسَيْتُمُوهُ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرًا

output.code:
# Let's construct citation entries.
def make_entry(idx, is_valid, citation_type="Aya", sura_name=None, sura_number=None, aya_number=None, corrected_text=None, completely_invalid=False):
    entry = {
        "span_start": start_positions[idx-1],
        "span_end": end_positions[idx-1],
        "span_text": segments[idx-1],
        "citation_type": citation_type,
        "is_valid": is_valid,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": corrected_text if corrected_text is not None else ("خطأ" if not is_valid else segments[idx-1]),
        "completely_invalid": completely_invalid
    }
    if citation_type == "Aya" and is_valid:
        entry["aya_reference"] = {
            "sura_name": sura_name,
            "sura_number": sura_number,
            "aya_number": aya_number
        }
    else:
        entry["aya_reference"] = {}
    return entry

citations = []
# Segment 1
citations.append(make_entry(1, True, "Aya", "الكهف", 18, 60, corrected_text="وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِفَتَاهُ لَا أَبْرَحُ حَتَّىٰ أَبْلُغَ مَجْمَعَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ أَوْ أَمْضِيَ حُقُبًا", completely_invalid=False))
# Segment 2
citations.append(make_entry(2, True, "Aya", "الكهف", 18, 61, corrected_text="فَلَمَّا بَلَغَا مَجْمَعَ بَيْنِهِمَا نَسِيَا حُوتَهُمَا فَاتَّخَذَ سَبِيلَهُ فِي الْبَحْرِ سَرَبًا", completely_invalid=False))
# Segment 3 invalid
for idx in [3,4,5]:
    citations.append(make_entry(idx, False, "Aya", corrected_text="خطأ", completely_invalid=True))
# Segment 6 matches Taha 20:91 (with correction)
citations.append(make_entry(6, True, "Aya", "طه", 20, 91, corrected_text="قَالُوا لَنْ نَبْرَحَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفِينَ حَتَّىٰ يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ", completely_invalid=False))
# Segments 7..17 except 6 are invalid
for idx in range(7,18):
    if idx == 6:
        continue
    citations.append(make_entry(idx, False, "Aya", corrected_text="خطأ", completely_invalid=True))

len(citations)

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
